# Indie Music India

> Free tools, data, and an artist development programme for independent Indian musicians. The focus is everything around the music: the economics, the identity, the network, and release strategy. Built by Siby John and Karishma Changroth.

Indie Music India (https://indiemusicindia.com) helps independent Indian artists understand and navigate the music business, without a label. It combines free, data-driven tools with a paid Artist Development Programme run by two consultants.

## Free tools
- [Radar](https://indiemusicindia.com/radar.html): live tracker of independent Indian artists, venues, and upcoming shows across eight cities, updated daily from public data.
- [Reviewer Database](https://indiemusicindia.com/reviewers/): 1,100+ blogs, podcasts, playlist editors, and curators covering Indian indie music, with direct submission contacts, reach scores, and pricing.
- [Labels and Agencies](https://indiemusicindia.com/industry/): 127 India-first record labels and booking agencies, with who is actively signing and what career stage to approach them at.
- [Resources](https://indiemusicindia.com/resources/): a start-here shortlist, a curated reading list, and the full 79-document toolkit of templates and checklists.
- [Artist Playbook](https://indiemusicindia.com/playbook/): 44 sections covering identity, production, distribution, revenue, live performance, venue booking, sync licensing, and rights registration, specific to India.

## Programme
- [Artist Development Programme](https://indiemusicindia.com/programme/): Siby John and Karishma Changroth work directly with a small number of artists at a time. Start with one month, no commitment beyond that; the rate is shared on an intro call.

## About
- [About](https://indiemusicindia.com/about/): who is behind Indie Music India, why it exists, and the real economics of independent music in India.

## Key facts
- Founders: Siby John (13 years across YouTube India and LinkedIn, 400+ artists) and Karishma Changroth (Founding Member at Talented, Bangalore).
- Audience: independent musicians in India across nine languages (Hindi, Tamil, Telugu, Kannada, Malayalam, Bengali, Punjabi, Marathi, English).
- Cost to use the tools: free. Contact: sibyjohn0@gmail.com, WhatsApp +91 99600 25559.
